verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come and see the glory of the Lord Come behold the Lamb Come and know the mercy of the King Bowing down before Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come and give thanks unto The Lord Come behold The LAMB come and sing the praises of The King Bowing down before Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For He is Lord above the heavens Lord in all the earth Lord of all the angels Worthy - so worthy - to be served
